item.title: IPL 2026: Chinnaswamy Stadium gets Karnataka govt nod to host matches
item.description: The Chinnaswamy Stadium had faced intense scrutiny after a stampede occurred during Royal Challengers Bengaluru's IPL title celebrations in June 2025

item.title: Ola Electric Q3FY26 result: Loss narrows to ₹487 cr, revenue drops 55%
item.description: Ola Electric Q3FY26 result: Loss narrows to ₹487 cr, revenue drops 55%

item.title: T20 World Cup 2026: USA vs Netherlands preview, toss time, live streaming
item.description: After coming close to upsetting India in their opening game in Mumbai, the USA was outclassed by Pakistan in their second match in Colombo.

item.title: UK study visas drop 31% in January 2026, work, care routes plunge too
item.description: UK Health and Care Worker visas fall to 500; study route records weakest January in years after dependant and salary rule changes

item.title: Trai revamps DND, MySpeed apps after 10 years to improve service quality
item.description: Regulator to launch revamped MyCall app by March to improve quality of service and curb spam, as updated DND and MySpeed apps offer multilingual suppo...
